source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The grid below contains the $16$ points whose $x$- and $y$-coordinates are in the set $\{0,1,2,3\}$: <image1> A square with all four of its vertices among these $16$ points has area $A$. What is the sum of all possible values of $A$?
